subtitle: Pomodoro Timer & Focus Sounds
shortDescription: Stay focused with a beautiful Pomodoro timer, ambient sounds, and session tracking.
fullDescription:
FocusFlow helps you stay focused and productive with a clean, distraction-free Pomodoro timer.

Start a focus session, choose an ambient sound, and let FocusFlow keep you on track — even when your phone is locked.

FEATURES:

• Pomodoro Timer — Work/break cycles with customizable durations (15, 25, 45, or 50-minute sessions)
• Background Timer — Keeps running when your phone locks or the app is backgrounded
• Ambient Focus Sounds — Rain, forest, ocean waves, and more to help you concentrate
• Session History — Track your daily and weekly focus time with visual charts
• Activity Tags — Categorize sessions (Deep Work, Study, Exercise, Reading) and see breakdowns
• Focus Streak — Build a daily streak to stay motivated
• Multiple Themes — Choose from Calm Slate, Warm Earth, Forest, or Midnight themes
• Push Notifications — Get notified when your timer completes
• Presets — Quick-start with Pomodoro (25min), Deep Work (50min), or Quick Focus (15min)

PREMIUM (optional):
• All ambient sounds unlocked
• No ads
• Premium themes
• Detailed analytics

FocusFlow works completely offline — no account required, no data leaves your device. Your focus data stays private.

Built by the Abraham Oladotun Foundation NFP.
releaseNotes: Initial release of FocusFlow — your calm, focused Pomodoro timer with ambient sounds, session tracking, and premium features.

screenshots.note: Take screenshots on iPhone 15 Pro Max (6.7") and iPhone SE (4.7") for iOS. Pixel 7 for Android.
screens: Timer screen — active focus session with progress ring
Stats screen — weekly chart and session breakdown
